homex.coLead: KWT GmbH manufactures pipes and fittings for water supply in several plastics, positioning the company in the construction value chain as supplier and manufacturer at once.
homex.kesselText: A close, long-standing partnership connects us with premium manufacturer KESSEL — "Leading in drainage". We carry these decades of experience into the future.
homex.worldText: For decades, K-Aqua products have proven themselves countless times in projects all over the world.

cards.d: Continuous improvement of occupational, environmental and health protection — per DIN EN ISO 14001 and 50001.
Development and production in Waldsolms — quality, cost and schedule always in balance.
Resource conservation and environmental compatibility are integral to our understanding of quality.

products.lead: A complete piping system for hot and cold drinking water — from pipe to fitting to welding technology.

range.d: Monolayer and glass-fibre reinforced multilayer pipes in SDR 6, 7.4, 9, 11 and 17. Dimensions from 20 mm to 630 mm.
Fittings from 20 mm to 315 mm, complemented by valves, unions and transition pieces.
Cutting tools, welding devices and welding machines for socket, butt and electrofusion welding.
Designed for drinking water — hot and cold — with high temperature and pressure resistance over decades.

products.techLead: Depending on pipe type from 20 mm to 630 mm — fittings up to 315 mm.

solutions.lead: Why polypropylene is the right material for tomorrow’s water supply — ecologically, technically and economically.

benefits.d: Polypropylene is made from gases that used to be burned off uselessly — drastically reducing air pollution. Production uses water in a closed cooling loop, protecting rivers, streams and lakes.
PP carries recycling code "5" and can be separated by type. We recycle all production waste and offcuts — amid high demand for PP recyclate.
As an engineering plastic, PP is unusually resistant to solvents, alkalis and acids — and injection-moulds complex geometries at low cost and high volume.
PP products last significantly longer than comparable materials: low-maintenance, wear-resistant and stable against ageing and temperature extremes.

solutions.nextLead: See how these material benefits become concrete in the K-Aqua product range.

service.lead: Technical documents for download and step-by-step videos for all welding methods.
service.vidLead: Four methods, four videos — straight from practice.

about.lead: New strategies, grown knowledge: KWT GmbH combines decades of manufacturing experience with a clear view ahead.
about.p1: The business field of KWT GmbH is manufacturing pipes and fittings for water supply in several plastics — positioning the company in the construction value chain as building-material supplier and manufacturer.
about.p2: A close, long-standing partnership exists with premium manufacturer KESSEL — "Leading in drainage". With these decades of experience we carry our success into the future.
about.polLead: No customer value without employee value, no employee value without company value — and no company value without value for the environment and society.

cards.d: All employees are involved in the continuous improvement process — quality always remains compatible with cost and schedule.
Wishes of customers and all stakeholders are recognised, taken seriously and implemented in compliance with legal and social standards.
All company activities respect resource conservation, environmental compatibility and strict compliance with all obligations.

about.genauLead: The GENAU management system is integrated into the House of KWT — a central element of our philosophy.
points: Continuous improvement of occupational, environmental and health protection
Prevention, ongoing hazard identification and risk assessment
Every employee is obliged to report hazards and participate actively
about.certText: Our lived GENAU management meets the requirements of DIN EN ISO 14001 and 50001 — extended by ISO 9001:2015 since October 2025.

news.p: Our ISO management system has been expanded and now covers quality, environmental and energy management:

genau: Occupational health and safety with continuous hazard identification — every employee is obliged to actively report risks.
Optimising energy efficiency per ISO 50001 — from the extruder to the closed cooling-water loop.
100% of offcuts and production waste go back into the material cycle.

partner.lead: The close, decades-long partnership with KESSEL transfers premium trust from drainage into water supply.

rings.d: Premium manufacturer of drainage technology. World-leading fairs like ISH, the PlanerPortal and the KundenForum make KESSEL an authority of the building-services industry.
The supply side of the same engineering DNA: complete PP-R/PP-RCT system d20–d630, made in Germany. Drainage and supply from one community of values.
Planners benefit twice: training, welding support and digital planning tools — prospectively up to a parametric pipe-network configurator.

partner.whyTitle: The backbone of the product promise.

cards.d: Immune to electrochemical corrosion — no pitting, no pipe bursts as with copper or galvanised steel.
Minimal heat loss in hot-water circulation — direct energy savings over decades.
Taste- and odour-neutral; the extremely smooth inner surface prevents biofilm and incrustation.

academy.lead: Four welding methods on video — and a quiz that makes you a Welding Master. Optimised for the site: big targets, high contrast.

videos.s: up to d63 — hand welding device

academy.intro: Test your PP-R/PP-RCT processing knowledge. Flawless = "Welding Master" badge (+75 points).

quiz.q: Which welding method is standard for large dimensions (e.g. d630)?
What does SDR stand for in piping systems?
What distinguishes PP-RCT from classic PP-R?
o: Modified crystal structure → more temperature & pressure reserve

quiz.q: Which recycling code does polypropylene carry?
In electrofusion welding the heat comes …
o: from embedded heating coils in the fitting

academy.resGood: Solid! "Welding Journeyman" badge secured. For the master: all five correct.
academy.resLow: The videos above help — then the master will follow.

buyers.whyTitle: Six reasons that land in the calculation.

why.d: PP-RCT with modified crystalline structure — more temperature and pressure reserve over decades.
No rust, no scaling, no pitting risks as with metallic pipes.
Recycling code 5, far smaller footprint than copper or steel — provable in the CO₂ calculator.
Pipe, fitting, valve and welding technology from one hand — from the manufacturer, not the middleman.

rfq.lead: Four short steps to a no-obligation enquiry. You receive a personal reply from our sales team within one business day.

types.d: Drinking-water installation in residential or commercial buildings.
Replacing existing metal or PVC pipework.

rfq.dimsHint: Rough figures are enough — we refine together. Multiple selection possible.
rfq.privacy: On submitting, a pre-filled email to info@k-aqua.de opens. No data is stored on this page.
rfq.doneText: Your email client has opened with the pre-filled enquiry. Send it off — we will be in touch within one business day. Prefer to talk directly?

frankfurt.water: Hard water (14–20 °dH) — corrosion-free PP-R/PP-RCT prevents scale incrustation on rough metal surfaces.
frankfurt.note: In the Rhine-Main region, K-Aqua delivers ex-works Waldsolms — often on the same day.
frankfurt.focusHeading: Typical projects in Frankfurt am Main

berlin.water: Moderately hard water from bank filtrate — hygienic neutrality of PP prevents biofilm formation in extensive networks.
berlin.note: Major projects in the capital region are delivered via forwarding partners within 24 hours.

muenchen.water: Soft Alpine water with a low pH range — PP is stable where copper faces increased solubility.
muenchen.note: Southern Germany logistics via overnight delivery; on-site welding training can be booked.

hamburg.water: Soft to moderately hard groundwater — taste-neutral PP systems preserve the high raw water quality.
hamburg.note: Northern Germany from stock; large dimensions d250+ project-specific directly from extrusion.

wien.water: Mountain spring water of excellent quality — value preservation through absolutely inert pipe materials.
wien.note: EU internal market: no customs formalities, delivery in 48 hours.

zuerich.water: Lake and spring water mix — Swiss hygiene requirements demand certified material neutrality.
zuerich.note: Export processing including Swiss certificates of conformity from a single source.

london.water: Very hard water (Thames Basin) — PP-RCT remains free from scale build-up and cross-section narrowing.
london.note: WRAS-compliant documentation and English data sheets available.

paris.water: Hard Seine water with lime load — smooth PP inner surfaces keep pressure losses constant over decades.
paris.note: ACS certificates of conformity and French installation guidelines included.

mailand.water: Groundwater from the Po Valley with high hardness — scale-free systems perceptibly reduce maintenance costs.
mailand.note: Alpine transit logistics 48–72 hours; Italian documentation available.

warschau.water: Vistula bank filtrate — fast-growing housing market with high demand for fast-to-install systems.
warschau.note: EU logistics 24–48 hours; Polish processing guidelines available.

prag.water: Vltava reservoir water — stable quality, strong renovation market in historical buildings.
prag.note: Neighboring market ex-works: delivery in 24 hours, technical hotline in German and English.

dubai.water: Desalinated seawater with high chloride load and continuous temperatures >30 °C — the core scenario for PP-RCT temperature reserves.
dubai.note: Ocean freight FCL from Hamburg; butt fusion welding supervision can be booked on site.

abudhabi.water: Desalinated water with post-hardening — Estidama sustainability points reward recyclable pipe materials.
abudhabi.note: Estidama Pearl Rating documentation (material transparency) is attached to the quote.

doha.regulator: Kahramaa — Qatar General Electricity & Water Corp.
doha.water: 99% desalinated water, network temperatures up to 40 °C in summer — long-term hydrostatic strength is the key selection criterion.
doha.note: Kahramaa QCS-compliant submittal packages and third-party test reports available.

riad.water: Mix of desalination (SWCC pipelines) and fossil groundwater — extreme summer heat demands PP-RCT reserves.
riad.note: SASO certification and SABER registration are provided on a project-specific basis.

dschidda.water: Red Sea desalination with high local salt load — absolute freedom from corrosion is a knock-out criterion against metal here.
dschidda.note: Ocean freight directly to Jeddah Islamic Port; Arabic data sheets in progress.

neom.water: 100% renewable-powered desalination planned — the project demands fully circular materials: Recycling Code 5 included.
neom.note: Early planning phase: K-Aqua supports with EPD data and parametric piping network models.
neom.focusHeading: Typical projects in NEOM / The Line

kuwait.water: Desalinated Gulf water mixed with brackish water — chloride-resistant plastic systems are the standard recommendation.
kuwait.note: MEW pre-qualification via local partners; delivery via Shuwaikh Port.

maskat.water: Desalination plus Aflaj tradition — Oman rewards durable, low-maintenance systems in public tenders.
maskat.note: GCC logistics corridor via Jebel Ali; technical acceptance according to Nama protocol.

manama.water: Fully desalinated network with high summer temperatures — PP-RCT maintains the pressure reserve where PVC ages.
manama.note: Compact market with short distances — complete packages including welding equipment rental.

amman.regulator: WAJ — Water Authority of Jordan / Miyahuna
amman.water: One of the most water-scarce countries in the world — leak-free welded joints are active water conservation policy (Non-Revenue Water < 2%).
amman.note: Development bank funded projects: K-Aqua delivers tender-compliant documentation.

kairo.regulator: HCWW — Holding Company for Water & Wastewater
kairo.water: Nile water with seasonal turbidity — smooth PP surfaces minimize deposition in domestic installations.
kairo.note: EOS registration via local partners; Mediterranean sea freight from Hamburg 10–14 days.

istanbul.water: Reservoir water with seasonal variations — earthquake-safe, ductile pipe behavior is a key design criterion.
istanbul.note: Flexible supply chains via road (5–7 days) or ocean freight.

singapur.water: NEWater & desalinated water, tropical continuous heat — highest demands on long-term hydrostatic strength.
singapur.note: Ocean freight from Hamburg; complete PUB submission documents available.

kualalumpur.water: Tropical surface water, high ambient humidity — UV and aging-resistant systems are standard.
kualalumpur.note: SPAN listing via distribution partners; ASEAN hub for the region.

mumbai.water: Monsoon-influenced reservoir supply with intermittent operation — pressure surge resistant welded joints count twice.
mumbai.note: BIS compliance on a project-specific basis; technical training remote + on-site.

kapstadt.water: Water scarcity after 'Day Zero' — leak-free welded joints are active water conservation policy here.
kapstadt.note: Project business with local partner network; training of welding teams included.

nairobi.water: Reservoir and groundwater mix in rapidly growing metropolis — robust, easy-to-train connection technology in demand.
nairobi.note: East Africa hub: delivery via Mombasa; welding training as capacity building.
